description: Composition Green and white plaid checked full sleeves shirt with a hint of white, made of 100% cotton with a 100% cotton lining, full length buttoned placket with a mid sleeve button, brand embroidery on the right shoulder with shoulder panels in fabric, two pockets on the chest, and a brand tab above the right pocket Fitting Slim Wash care only hand wash in cold water using a mild detergent Do not wring or bleach Flat dry in shade Warm iron Checks that add immense style to your casual look is what scullers brings into your life. Be the cynosure of all eyes in this stylish shirt, while the fabric keeps you fresh and comfortable all day. Pair it with formal pants, denims or corduroys and black footwear for stylish formal and casual looks. Model statistics The model wears size M in shirts Height-6', Shoulders-18"
